tool.name: ci_pipeline_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze CI/CD pipeline configurations for security vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect expression injection in GitHub Actions workflows - Find dangerous triggers (pull_request_target, workflow_run) - Identify hardcoded secrets in CI configurations - Audit Jenkinsfile for script injection vulnerabilities - Check GitLab CI for variable injection and external includes

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze_github_actions: Analyze GitHub Actions workflow file - analyze_gitlab_ci: Analyze .gitlab-ci.yml file - analyze_jenkinsfile: Analyze Jenkinsfile - find_secrets: Search for hardcoded secrets in CI file - full_audit: Run all checks on a directory

parameter.name: file_path
parameter.description: Path to the CI configuration file to analyze. Required for all actions except full_audit.

parameter.name: directory
parameter.description: Directory to scan. Required for full_audit action.

returns.description: Analysis results with security findings and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Analyze GitHub Actions workflow
analyze_github_actions .github/workflows/ci.yml
# Analyze GitLab CI configuration
analyze_gitlab_ci .gitlab-ci.yml
# Find secrets in CI file
find_secrets Jenkinsfile
# Full security audit of directory
full_audit .
